title: Swatch
body:
Blocks to expand build palettes with new colors. All blocks can be made from vanilla materials.

future plans: Extra blocks are planned. There is no intention of backporting or a NeoForge port at this time.

![blocks in game](https://imgur.com/SM768tr.pngp)

![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca6e4059c224602220fd390bd1de88fa7918eff7.png)
